name: Lassi (Yogurt Drink)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds from each cardamom pod and crush them lightly.
2. Blend 3 cups of yogurt, crushed cardamom, and sugar in an electric blender until smooth.
3. Beat the remaining yogurt well in a bowl.
4. Add the beaten yogurt to the contents of the blender and mix thoroughly.
5. Pour in rose water and mix well.
6. Serve the lassi in individual glasses and sprinkle with nutmeg before serving.
